commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
Adds a new `ui/docs/design-system/` Markdown guide set covering the design-system overview, glass surfaces, color tokens, motion, and accessibility checklist.

PR surface: Docs +439. Total +439 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: comparing the PR diff to current `ui/src/styles/base.css` and `ui/src/styles/layout.css` reproduces the documented value mismatches. There is no runtime bug to reproduce because this is a docs-only PR.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The blocker is a mechanical docs/source synchronization issue that an automated repair can update without product judgment.

target.title: docs: UX-013 — design system documentation
target.body:
Adds `ui/docs/design-system/` with 5 files documenting the glass surface system, color tokens with WCAG contrast ratios, motion standards, and an accessibility checklist.

## Files added

- `README.md` — index + one-paragraph summary of the design language and five guiding principles
- `glass-surfaces.md` — two glass tiers with exact CSS values as-found in source, no-solid-panels rule, `@supports` fallback pattern, anti-patterns
- `color-tokens.md` — full token table with dark/light values, intended use, contrast ratios on dark bg, anti-patterns
- `motion.md` — duration scale (`--duration-fast/normal/slow`), easing tokens, `prefers-reduced-motion` pattern, animation inventory sourced from actual codebase
- `accessibility.md` — WCAG 2.1 AA checklist: contrast minimums, `:focus-visible` pattern, 44px tap targets, skip link, focus trap, ARIA labels, `role="tab"` pattern, reduced-motion, testing tools

All values reflect reality (read directly from `base.css`, `chat/layout.css`, `components.css`), not assumptions.

Prevents design regressions and onboards contributors to the visual language.

Part of UI/UX Enhancement Sprint 2.
target.author: bunsdev

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
